title: One man in a boat
question: 把今天课文里“别人看结果，自己享受过程”的想法放进你的生活。这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。用 word bank 填 3 个空。
example_answer: I am not really interested in winning a prize. I am only interested in drawing quietly and relaxing. My friends think it is a waste of time, but they don't realize that I enjoy the process.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 别人看结果：你并不是只为了赢一个奖
options.english_template: I am not really interested in ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 真正的过程：你喜欢安静地做这件事
options.english_template: I am only interested in ___ and relaxing.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 点出差别：朋友觉得浪费时间，但他们没意识到你享受过程
options.english_template: My friends think it is a waste of time, but they don't realize that I ___.
